ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-26-2004 CONTINUED TO DEC-16-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH NOV-19-2004. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-26-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO OSC RE ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HODGE, TERRY-LINDA

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS REQUESTED IN THE NOTICE OF DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE THE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. 2) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET #1, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED FURTHER RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES 6.4, 6.7(B), 8.4, 8.7, AND 20.8 PURSUANT TO C.C.P SECTION 2030(F)(1) WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. 3) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET #1, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. 4) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO THE REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET #1, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES AND DOCUMENTS, WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER; FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS AN ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF 686.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
